core_identity.essence: A remote Indian Ocean archipelago where pristine beaches, granite landscapes, and untouched nature create one of the purest forms of emotional escape.
core_identity.city_feeling: Seychelles feels distant, pure, and almost unreal — a place where silence, ocean, and nature define the emotional experience more than human activity.

sensory_profile.soundscape: Ocean waves, wind through palm trees, distant birds, and complete natural silence.
sensory_profile.visual_feeling: White sand beaches, turquoise water, granite boulders, dense tropical greenery, and untouched coves.

match_narratives.high_match: Seychelles may deeply resonate with you if you are seeking complete emotional escape, isolation, and natural purity. You likely value silence, ocean immersion, and environments that feel untouched and almost surreal in their beauty. This destination rewards emotional reset, intimacy, and disconnection from the world.
match_narratives.medium_match: You may connect with Seychelles during phases where you seek luxury relaxation, romantic seclusion, or a deep break from overstimulation. It is especially powerful for slow travel focused on rest and emotional clarity.
match_narratives.low_match_warning: If you strongly prefer cultural density, nightlife, urban exploration, or social stimulation, Seychelles may feel too isolated, quiet, or limited in activity.
match_narratives.emotional_hook: A place where the world disappears and only nature remains.

possible_downsides: Can feel isolating for social travelers

winter.description: Winter is quiet and humid, with a deeply introspective and secluded atmosphere.

spring.description: Spring is one of the best periods, with balanced weather, calm seas, and vibrant tropical nature.

summer.description: Summer is warm and humid, with lush landscapes and a slower rhythm.

autumn.description: Autumn brings calm seas, soft weather, and ideal conditions for emotional reset and romance.

solo_trip.description: Good for introspective solo travel and emotional reset, but can feel isolated.

couple_trip.description: One of the strongest romantic and honeymoon destinations in the world.

friends_trip.description: Works for luxury group trips, though not ideal for active nightlife-focused travel.

creative_escape.description: Extreme natural beauty supports reflection, creativity, and emotional clarity.

emotional_reset.description: One of the most powerful destinations globally for emotional detox and reset.

digital_nomad_stay.description: Possible but limited infrastructure for long-term structured remote work.

destination_dna.travel_feeling: Seychelles feels like stepping outside of reality.
